response.justification: The candidate is a versatile senior full-stack developer with strong craftsmanship practices, but the profile diverges sharply from this role's core requirements. C++ experience is limited to a short stint at National Instruments and a thesis project, far from the required 8 years. Cloud experience is application-level (AWS CDK, Kubernetes deployments) rather than building compute platforms, and there is no evidence of formal technical leadership of teams or cross-team alignment at the scale this role demands.
strengths: High-throughput, low-latency systems experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (millions of requests/sec)
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, mentoring via workshops and courses
Broad polyglot background with long-running open-source ownership (GISCollective)
concerns: Falls far short of the 8-year C++ requirement; primary languages are TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang
No demonstrated experience building or operating large-scale cloud compute infrastructure
No formal technical-leadership role managing priorities, deadlines, or cross-team deliverables

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud platform / infrastructure depth
